samples.text: Ice feels cold to the touch. Is this expected based on common sense?
Ice is cold when you touch it. Does this match everyday common sense?
A block of frozen water feels cold to the touch. Is this expected based on common sense?
Frozen water is cold. Ice is frozen water, so it feels cold. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
Ice feels cold to the touch. Someone left the door open earlier. Is this expected based on common sense?
